name: Bennett Spring State Park (spring branch)
notes: Daily trout tag required; stocked nightly Mar 1 - Oct 31.

name: Montauk State Park (Current River headwaters)
notes: Daily trout tag required; winter catch-and-release season.

name: Roaring River State Park
notes: Daily trout tag required; hatchery at spring source.

name: Maramec Spring Park
notes: James Foundation park; daily trout tag required.

name: Shepherd of the Hills Hatchery (Lake Taneycomo)
notes: Bank access just below Table Rock Dam; trophy area nearby.

name: Tan Vat Access (Current River)
notes: MDC access in Blue Ribbon brown trout water below Montauk.
